# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Institutional Website Finalization v42

v42 fixes the remaining public website seams: menu stacking, blank route catalogs, JS-dependent navigation fallbacks, and older pages that looked like development artifacts.

## Main fixes

- Start page rebuilt as a clean first-click path.
- Coordination Lab rebuilt as a centered, browser-local proof-governed institution simulator.
- Concierge rebuilt with static recommended paths and full route catalog.
- Command Center rebuilt with static route cards and nonzero route count.
- Experience Hub, Site Atlas, and Navigation Atlas rebuilt as static-first catalog surfaces.
- Single navigation contract preserved: one native header plus floating Site Command.

## Safety

Public surfaces remain browser-local and default-deny: no wallet, no forms, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no network request, no transaction broadcast, no funds moved, and no production authority.
